comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: This line — 'the reaction stayed attached to the thing it was reacting to' — is the whole thesis in one sentence. Everything else is supporting.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: The 'no cost to flagging one paragraph while enjoying the next' point resonates. The lack of cost is what lets it become a habit instead of a ceremony.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: Disagree gently here — I think there IS a version of this that works in real-time chat, but only if both sides treat specific paragraphs as addressable. The infrastructure helps but isn't strictly required.
